settings.title: Designed in studio
settings.body: Every silhouette is sketched by hand and refined across dozens of iterations before tooling begins.

settings.title: Cast & finished
settings.body: We work with small-batch foundries — each piece is finished by a single craftsperson, start to end.

settings.title: Inspected & signed
settings.body: Before shipping, every lamp is signed and numbered. Lifetime serviceable, fully repairable.

settings.heading: Slow craft, built to last.
settings.description: Every fixture goes through three deliberate stages before it leaves our studio.

settings.quote: The most considered lamp I’ve ever owned. The light it casts genuinely changes how I use the room.
settings.name: Alex M.

settings.quote: It arrived perfectly packed, signed and numbered. Feels like an object you’d pass down, not replace.
settings.name: Sofia R.

settings.quote: I have three from the night collection now. The light quality is unlike anything I’ve owned before.
settings.name: Daniel K.
